meta.purpose: Cursor/AI design tokens and patterns distilled from reference screenshots; semantic roles over brand literals.
meta.notes: References span marketing sites and one mobile UI. Prefer tokens + roles; pick one typography mode (serif+sans vs single sans) per product.

principles: Generous whitespace; vertical rhythm over density.
Nature-inspired palettes (greens, cream, earth) with one high-contrast accent for primary actions.
Photography-led sections with warm or slightly desaturated grading.
Soft geometry: large radii, pills, occasional fluid/wavy section masks or overlapping color blocks.
Depth from layering (overlap, color blocks, subtle elevation) rather than heavy chrome.

semanticRoles.surface: white or very light tint on canvas
semanticRoles.surfaceElevated: white with optional pastel wash for category/chip backgrounds
semanticRoles.primary: deep muted green or teal (text on light, large fills, active states)
semanticRoles.primaryForeground: white or cream on primary fills
semanticRoles.accent: single warm contrast CTA (terracotta/coral) OR cream-on-dark inversion—choose one primary CTA logic per theme
semanticRoles.overlay: semi-transparent scrim on imagery when text sits on photos

palettePatterns.pastelIconBubbles: soft lime, mint, yellow, sky, coral circles behind outline icons
palettePatterns.sectionBands: alternate canvas ↔ muted green/sage/teal bands; dark forest for high-impact bands
palettePatterns.onDark: cream or white type; cream pill buttons on dark green

editorialPairing.display: high-contrast serif for H1/H2; optional italic for emphasis inside headlines
editorialPairing.ui: clean geometric or humanist sans for nav, body, buttons, labels
editorialPairing.eyebrow: small caps or all-caps sans with increased letter-spacing

singleSans.display: bold/large geometric sans; optional wide tracking on uppercase headings
singleSans.ui: same family; weight/size contrast carries hierarchy

scalePattern.heroDisplay: largest size, tight or comfortable tracking per font
scalePattern.meta: smaller sans for dates, captions, legal

weights: semibold for card titles and key labels
rules: Do not mix more than two families in one interface.
Keep button and nav in sans when using serif display.
Optional decorative script/italic only for accent words, not body.

usage.pageInline: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2rem) or fixed 20–24px mobile; wide side margins on desktop editorial layouts
usage.sectionBlock: large vertical gaps (e.g. 4–10rem) between major sections

layoutRules.grid: 12-column mental model; expose as 1–3–4 column feature grids on desktop
layoutRules.alignment: mix allowed: centered hero vs left-aligned editorial columns; keep consistency within a section
layoutRules.asymmetry: hero text + large image offset; floating small stat cards overlapping hero media
layoutRules.maxWidth: constrain readable text column (~65ch) inside wide sections
layoutRules.fullBleed: heroes and banded sections full width; inner container padded
layoutRules.figureTreatment: large rounded rectangles; optional circular or blob masks; overlap with solid color rectangles

variants: full-bleed photo + centered or left headline block
photo background + frosted glass panel card for headline/CTA
split: text column + large rounded image

sectionPatterns.band: solid color horizontal band with large top radius (scoop/bowl) transitioning from previous section
sectionPatterns.featureGrid: 2–4 columns of image-forward cards with title + short description
sectionPatterns.editorial: eyebrow + serif headline + sans body + single primary CTA
sectionPatterns.footer: often darker or textured neutral band; simplified links and CTA

default.background: surface white or very light tint
default.radius: medium (12–16px) for dense grids; large (20–32px) for editorial/luxury
default.shadow: soft, low-opacity, wide blur; avoid harsh drops
default.padding: uniform; content top-aligned when image + text stack

imageForward.layout: image dominant with text overlay bottom-left or below image
imageForward.ctaAffordance: small circular icon button (e.g. arrow) corner placement

mobileList.pattern: vertical stack of rounded rectangles with internal row layout

primary.shape: pill (full round ends) most common; occasional 8px rounded rect
primary.label: sans, often all-caps small; high contrast on fill
primary.width: auto or full-width on mobile onboarding flows

secondary.style: outline thin neutral, ghost on imagery, or solid that blends with section color

composite.pattern: pill button with trailing circular icon chip (arrow) integrated on the right

iconOnly.shape: circle for FAB and card corner actions

fields.shape: rounded rect; search often full pill
fields.border: thin light border or borderless on tinted field background
fields.background: light gray fill on canvas or white on tinted section
fields.label: above field; small sans

inputAndFormStyles.grouping: nest form in colored band for visual grouping

marketing.layout: logo left, links center or left cluster, primary CTA right
marketing.style: transparent over hero → solid/blurred on scroll (implied)
marketing.utilities: thin outline icons (search, account, notifications) right-aligned

floatingBar.shape: pill-shaped nav container floating inset from top
floatingBar.background: cream/white solid or translucent with soft shadow

app.layout: avatar + greeting left; calendar/notification icons right; or close + centered pill control + icon
app.title: large display headline below bar

headerNavigationPatterns.mobileCollapse: hamburger or bottom nav (not shown—reserve for small breakpoints)

tokens.xl: 40px+ for hero cards and section scoops

borderRadius.consistencyRule: pick one card radius tier per product; buttons usually pill; imagery matches card tier or larger

shadows.elevationMedium: soft wide blur; no sharp offset
shadows.usage: cards, floating nav, glass panels sparingly; prefer flat sections with color overlap

iconographyStyle.stroke: outline/linear icons; 1–2px stroke; rounded caps where appropriate
iconographyStyle.fill: optional solid icons in app chrome
iconographyStyle.color: inherit text or white on dark; accent circles for categories
iconographyStyle.decorative: sparse hand-drawn marks (circles, x, wavy arrows) only as accent—not for core UI

techniques: color: accent for labels and key words; primary green for persistent emphasis
weight: bold headings vs regular body
imagery scale: one dominant visual per viewport height where possible
visualHierarchy.selectionStates: filled primary circle for active date/chip; dot indicator optional; radio-style completion affordance on list rows

mobileResponsivenessPatterns.typography: fluid clamp on display sizes; reduce tracking if wrapping suffers
mobileResponsivenessPatterns.hero: stack image under text; glass card full width with reduced padding
mobileResponsivenessPatterns.floatingElements: reorder floating stat cards below hero image
mobileResponsivenessPatterns.touch: min 44px targets for chips, list rows, FAB, icon buttons
mobileResponsivenessPatterns.safeArea: respect notches; bottom padding for home indicator on app-style screens

interactionPatterns.hover: subtle lift (translateY) + shadow deepen on cards; lighten/darken fills on buttons; underline or color shift on links
interactionPatterns.focus: visible focus ring consistent with primary color
interactionPatterns.scroll: optional nav background transition; parallax not required
interactionPatterns.horizontal: chips and date strips scroll horizontally with snap optional
interactionPatterns.motion: prefer short fades; avoid aggressive bounces

toneAndMood.voice: calm, professional, empathetic, premium without coldness
toneAndMood.visualMood: soft contrast, warm neutrals, restrained accent use
whatToAvoid: sharp brutalist corners unless intentional exception
